findings.evidence: `rg -n "alexander.*sub|JX x - G\.JX y|JO x - G\.JO y" code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid` finds only `GradingChange.lean:129` for this identity; nearby `Gradings.lean:114` only has the one-state `maslovO_sub_maslovX_eq`.
findings.fix: Add an exported lemma, preferably in `Gradings.lean`, with signature `theorem alexander_sub_eq_JX_sub_JO (x y : GridState n) : G.alexander x - G.alexander y = (G.JX x - G.JX y) - (G.JO x - G.JO y)`, then use it in `alexander_source_sub_alexander_target`.
findings.issue: `hAlexander` proves a theorem that is independent of `R : GridRectangleBetween x y`, so the exported API only exposes the rectangle special case instead of the natural general Alexander-difference identity.

summary: The rectangle-specific J formulas are at the right level, but the Alexander step hides a general grading-difference lemma inside the special rectangle theorem.
